TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Padrangigrang ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Tayimari go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 108 buwan, 318 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 304 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 14 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 92%, Bunun 2%, Amis 1%, Tayan 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Padrangigrang hya' ga Calavi. tay 'llaw na Padrangigrang hya' ga Cilalongay. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Padrangigrang ga ungat pqwasan biru. spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh hmgiru lmosay ulay cyux ki'an ulay qu qalang. ulay qu wahan mima' ru mangay llpyung minkahul twahiq. ulay qu wahan mima' ru mangay llpyung minkahul twahiq. tuqi qsya' ki rrhzyal 'llaw balay ktan qu qalang myan. baqun tmnga' kwara' rgryax nya'. tuqi 'san ungat kisya' nya'. "tuqi'" qu spzyang glgang nha qalang musa' ana inu'.
S.PHON: alaŋ pa*raŋiɣraŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu tajimari ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, βunun *%, amis~ɕ *%, tajan *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkjaħuʔ na pa*raŋiɣraŋ ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨala*i. taj ʔllaw na pa*raŋiɣraŋ ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨilaloŋaj. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ pa*raŋiɣraŋ ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ ħmɣiru lmos~ɕaj ulaj ʦ~ʨjux kiʔan ulaj qu qalaŋ. ulaj qu waħan mimaʔ ru maŋaj llpjuŋ minkaħul twaħiq. ulaj qu waħan mimaʔ ru maŋaj llpjuŋ minkaħul twaħiq. tuqi qs~ɕjaʔ ki rrħzjal ʔllaw βalaj ktan qu qalaŋ mjan. βaqun tmŋaʔ kwaraʔ rɣrjax njaʔ. tuqi ʔs~ɕan uŋat kis~ɕjaʔ njaʔ. "tuqiʔ" qu s~ɕpzjaŋ ɣlɣaŋ nħa qalaŋ mus~ɕaʔ ana inuʔ.
S.FORM: alang Padrangigrang ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Tayimari go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 108 buwan, 318 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 304 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 14 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 92%, Bunun 2%, Amis 1%, Tayan 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Padrangigrang hya' ga Calavi. tay 'llaw na Padrangigrang hya' ga Cilalongay. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Padrangigrang ga ungat pqwasan biru. spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh hmgiru lmosay ulay cyux ki'an ulay qu qalang. ulay qu wahan mima' ru mangay llpyung minkahul twahiq. ulay qu wahan mima' ru mangay llpyung minkahul twahiq. tuqi qsya' ki rrhzyal 'llaw balay ktan qu qalang myan. baqun tmnga' kwara' rgryax nya'. tuqi 'san ungat kisya' nya'. "tuqi'" qu spzyang glgang nha qalang musa' ana inu'.
S.PHON: alaŋ pa*raŋiɣraŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu tajimari ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, βunun *%, amis~ɕ *%, tajan *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkjaħuʔ na pa*raŋiɣraŋ ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨala*i. taj ʔllaw na pa*raŋiɣraŋ ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨilaloŋaj. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ pa*raŋiɣraŋ ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ ħmɣiru lmos~ɕaj ulaj ʦ~ʨjux kiʔan ulaj qu qalaŋ. ulaj qu waħan mimaʔ ru maŋaj llpjuŋ minkaħul twaħiq. ulaj qu waħan mimaʔ ru maŋaj llpjuŋ minkaħul twaħiq. tuqi qs~ɕjaʔ ki rrħzjal ʔllaw βalaj ktan qu qalaŋ mjan. βaqun tmŋaʔ kwaraʔ rɣrjax njaʔ. tuqi ʔs~ɕan uŋat kis~ɕjaʔ njaʔ. "tuqiʔ" qu s~ɕpzjaŋ ɣlɣaŋ nħa qalaŋ mus~ɕaʔ ana inuʔ.
